packs.description: Production-grade detailer, detector, and SEG (segmentation) tooling. The most-used pack for face restoration, region-based refinement, and iterative upscaling on Comfy Cloud.

nodes.name: FaceDetailer
nodes.description: Detect and refine faces with iterative passes.

nodes.name: DetailerForEach
nodes.description: Run iterative detail refinement over detected SEG regions.

nodes.name: UltralyticsDetectorProvider
nodes.description: Provide detector models powered by Ultralytics YOLO.

nodes.name: SAMLoader
nodes.description: Load Segment Anything models for high-fidelity masking.

nodes.name: MaskToSEGS
nodes.description: Convert binary masks into SEGS regions for the detailer pipeline.

packs.description: Live system monitoring (GPU, RAM, disk) and rich image inspection inside your workflow. The most-installed quality-of-life pack on the registry.

nodes.name: CCrystools_Show_Resources
nodes.description: Display GPU, RAM and disk usage live in the workflow.

nodes.name: CCrystools_Show_Image
nodes.description: Inspect images at full resolution with metadata overlays.

nodes.name: CCrystools_Json
nodes.description: Compose and parse JSON inline for advanced workflows.

nodes.name: CCrystools_Pipe_To_Any
nodes.description: Convert a pipe bus into individual outputs.

nodes.name: CCrystools_Save_Metadata
nodes.description: Save images with workflow metadata embedded.

packs.description: Quality-of-life nodes that make complex workflows readable: Power Lora Loader, group bypassers, smarter reroutes, and inline debug widgets.

nodes.name: Power Lora Loader (rgthree)
nodes.description: Stack multiple LoRAs in a single, foldable widget.

nodes.name: Fast Groups Bypasser (rgthree)
nodes.description: Toggle whole groups on or off without rewiring.

nodes.name: Seed (rgthree)
nodes.description: A predictable seed control with quick reset.

nodes.name: Reroute (rgthree)
nodes.description: A clean reroute alternative with persistent labels.

nodes.name: Display Any (rgthree)
nodes.description: Inspect any value with a compact debug widget.

packs.description: Daily-driver utilities for image, latent and string handling: color matching, batch counters, resize helpers, and prompt presets.

nodes.name: ColorMatch
nodes.description: Match the colors of one image to another using statistics.

nodes.name: ImageResizeKJ
nodes.description: Resize images with intuitive size and divisibility controls.

nodes.name: StringConstantMultiline
nodes.description: A multi-line string constant suitable for prompts.

nodes.name: EmptyLatentImagePresets
nodes.description: Quickly create empty latents at common resolutions.

nodes.name: GetImageSizeAndCount
nodes.description: Read width, height and batch size from an image input.

packs.description: Simplified, opinionated nodes that bundle common patterns into single drop-ins — full loader, pre-sampling, easy KSampler, and XY plotting.

nodes.name: easy fullLoader
nodes.description: Combined checkpoint, VAE and CLIP loader with sensible defaults.

nodes.name: easy preSampling
nodes.description: A unified pre-sampling node bundling common settings.

nodes.name: easy kSampler
nodes.description: A simplified KSampler with extra quality-of-life options.

nodes.name: easy showAnything
nodes.description: Display any value inline for debugging.

nodes.name: easy XYPlot
nodes.description: Compose XY plots over arbitrary parameters.

packs.description: ControlNet with timestep keyframes, per-frame masks, and advanced strength scheduling — essential for animation and batched-latent workflows.

nodes.name: Apply Advanced ControlNet
nodes.description: Apply ControlNet with timestep keyframes and per-frame masks.

nodes.name: ControlNetLoaderAdvanced
nodes.description: Load ControlNet models with the advanced wrapper.

nodes.name: Latent Keyframe Group
nodes.description: Schedule ControlNet strength over a batch of latents.

nodes.name: Timestep Keyframe
nodes.description: Set ControlNet strength at a specific timestep.

nodes.name: Scaled Soft Mask
nodes.description: Apply a soft attention mask to ControlNet conditioning.

packs.description: A broad utility suite covering image adjustments, compositing, text, math, and I/O — the original "kitchen sink" pack still relied on by thousands of workflows.

nodes.name: Image Filter Adjustments
nodes.description: Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation and more.

nodes.name: Image Blending Mode
nodes.description: Composite two images with Photoshop-style blend modes.

nodes.name: Text String
nodes.description: A reusable text constant suitable for prompts.

nodes.name: Number to Float
nodes.description: Cast integer or string values to a float.

nodes.name: Image Save
nodes.description: Save an image to disk with rich filename templating.

packs.description: Required tooling for managing custom-node packs from inside ComfyUI. Bundled and pre-configured on Comfy Cloud so you can browse, install, and update without leaving the editor.

nodes.name: Manager Menu Anchor
nodes.description: Internal node that anchors Manager menu hooks (no-op for users).
